description: Contract schemas, capability catalogs, and governance rules all parse and validate. This manifest is the cheap-but-reliable guard before running anything that loads schemas at startup.

capabilities.description: All `schemas/*.schema.json` parse and validate (run by `pnpm run check:contract-schemas`).

install.instruction: Re-run `pnpm run check:contract-schemas` to see the failing schema. Fix the schema (or the validator pinning) and re-bootstrap.

capabilities.description: Capability + actuator catalogs (`CAPABILITIES_GUIDE.md`, manifest.json files, schema-loader index) are mutually consistent.

install.instruction: Re-run `pnpm run check:catalogs` to see the mismatch and update CAPABILITIES_GUIDE.md or the manifest.

capabilities.description: Governance policy rules (security-policy.json, integrity-policy.json, etc.) parse and pass their own schema.

install.instruction: Re-run `pnpm run check:governance-rules` to see the failing rule and fix it.

capabilities.description: ESM imports across the repo do not have invalid extensions / specifier shapes (run by `pnpm run check:esm`).

install.instruction: Re-run `pnpm run check:esm` to see the violation. Fix the import (typically: append `.js` to a relative TS import in a `.ts` file).
